name: JUST IN (via DSCC)
subject: MAJOR election news: (Elizabeth Warren)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Excellent news -- Elizabeth Warren is IN for 2018, and she's ready for anything the Party of Trump throws her way... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Excellent news, Friend -- Elizabeth Warren is IN for 2018, and she's ready for anything Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party throws her way. Just look at what she said: "I will fight today, tomorrow, next week, this year, next year and as long as I'm standing to build a future - not just for some of our kids, but for all of our kids. That's why I wanted to let you know that I am running for re-election in Massachusetts in 2018. I don't kid myself: the upcoming fights in the Senate -- and our campaign in Massachusetts in 2018 -- are likely to be uglier and nastier than anything we've ever imagined. I'm not taking anything for granted." Time and again, Elizabeth Warren has stood up for working families against powerful special interests and their right-wing enablers. **And we know each and every one of them will fight desperately to put her Senate seat back in Republican hands!**

**And that makes laying the foundation for success more vital than ever. Will you pitch in now to give senators like Elizabeth Warren a head start against the Party of Trump?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Friend, we saw this year how ruthlessly Donald Trump fought to silence progressive champions like Elizabeth Warren. **And we know early grassroots support is our only shot to outmatch Trump and the Republican Party this time around.**

[**That early grassroots support only happens with your help, Friend. So don't wait -- pitch in ASAP to stand with Elizabeth and Senate candidates like her to fight back and win in 2018 >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-warren?refcode=DPE-20170107-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Let's do this,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed1c/2b07114c/462d6a49/7368728d/570625050/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed1c/2b07114c/462d6a49/7368728c/570625050/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed1c/2b07114c/462d6a49/7368728f/570625050/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s time to get to work. Help decide our Party’s priorities for 2017. |

Friend, In 10 days, your government will once again work for YOU. Now that the House, the Senate, and the White House will ALL be under Republican control, it’s time for you to help prioritize the policies we’re going to pass in 2017 to Make America Great Again! Inauguration Day is coming up fast, and I want to get to work the second I’m sworn in as your next president. Please complete your 2017 Priorities Survey immediately. >> I want to be sure that I’m starting my presidency fighting for you, and representing the issues you care about -- and that I’m doing it in the order you want. From draining the swamp of corruption to repealing and replacing Obamacare, cutting regulations, reforming our broken tax system, building the wall, and reducing our trade deficit, there’s a lot we need to do to fix our country, but we have to prioritize. I’m heading to Washington to make deals that benefit the American people, that bring back American jobs, that reignite American energy, and that strengthen America as a whole. But I need you to tell me which specific policies you want me to pass as your champion in the White House. Please complete the 2017 Priorities Survey registered in your name. Thank you, Donald J. Trump

Please complete your 2017 Priorities Survey immediately. >>
-----------------------------------------------------------
http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba3XvQGXRzCHqWgaBDSqDRMN6aaaaCHFaBMHHIYqa?l=-@uDvAt&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=v&o=&0=r-rGsE1yirf0Z2ZnjHj3i4V71~r-yHZwYHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk

name: Barack Obama
subject: re: my address tomorrow
body:
I need you to step up. Friend --

Tomorrow, I'll give my final address as President -- so this is a major moment as we prepare for what's ahead. What we do now determines how we'll rebuild and reimagine our party, and how we will fight back against any efforts to undermine the work that we have done together.

I hope you'll remember that progress isn't always a straight line. We will have to work harder now, more so than ever before, to keep our country from moving in what we know is the wrong direction. So I need you to step up. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help Democrats protect our progress.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0c1/428840217/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0cf/428840217/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0ca/428840217/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0c8/428840217/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0d7/428840217/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0d2/428840217/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd")**

** Thanks,

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0d3/428840217/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0d0/428840217/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0d1/428840217/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1b7/4067b0a/234946e7e/7e79c0de/428840217/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo_nd&source=em_20170109_bo_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Team Maggie
subject: SURVEY: Hi there, we'd like your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3a/2a380d31/143327c4/fec0d2/557461770/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3a/2a380d31/143327c4/fec0d2/557461770/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello -- It looks like you haven't had a chance to share your thoughts on Donald Trump. Can you let us know where you stand before he's sworn in as President later this month?
Here's the link for the survey:** [http://maggiehassan.com/Thoughts-On-Trump](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3a/2a380d31/143327c4/fec0d3/557461770/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170117_17prioritiessurvey-nd?&source=e20170109_survey2-nd")**
Trump is ready to repeal the Affordable Care Act and defund Planned Parenthood, and he chose known homophobe, misogynist, and anti-Semite Steve Bannon as his Chief Strategist.
The President-elect will take the oath of office in less than two weeks, and it's really important that we hear your thoughts before then. [**Please, take a minute to fill out this survey and share what you're concerned about before the Trump administration gets to the White House.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3a/2a380d31/143327c4/fec0d3/557461770/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170117_17prioritiessurvey-nd?&source=e20170109_survey2-nd")
Thanks for making your voice heard,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3a/2a380d31/143327c4/fec0dc/557461770/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAxMDdfdHJ1bXAtc3VydmV5LW5kIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAxMDlfc3VydmV5Ml9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20170107_trump-survey-nd?refcode=e20170109_survey2_nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: "" "" Hello -- It looks like you haven't had a chance to share your thoughts on Donald Trump. Can you let us know where you stand before he's sworn in as President later this month? Here's the link for the survey: "" Trump is ready to repeal the Affordable Care Act and defund Planned Parenthood, and he chose known homophobe, misogynist, and anti-Semite Steve Bannon as his Chief Strategist. The President-elect will take the oath of office in less than two weeks, and it's really important that we hear your thoughts before then. "" Thanks for making your voice heard, Team Maggie ""

subject: 📺Watch the President’s farewell address - tomorrow @ 9 p.m. 📺

name: VanHollen.org
subject: fwd:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
The fight against the Republican plan to dismantle the Affordable Care Act has begun. Chris needs your help. | Friend, did you see Chris' email?

The fight against the Republican plan to dismantle the Affordable Care Act has begun. Chris needs your help.

[**Please add your name to tell Congressional Republicans that we will stand together to oppose their reckless scheme!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c76/3780787287/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+add+your+name+to+tell+Congression&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917")

_Begin Forwarded Message:_
> Friend,
>
> I was honored to be sworn in earlier this week to represent the people of Maryland in the United States Senate -- a chamber that has prided itself during our history for being a place of open debate and deliberation on critical issues facing our nation.
>
> Sadly, the Senate Republicans violated that tradition this week. In an unprecedented move, they started the session with a budget procedure that tramples on the rights of the minority in pursuit of their partisan obsession to dismantle the Affordable Care Act (ACA) -- with nothing to put in its place. That reckless act will generate chaos throughout our health care system.
>
> Ordinarily, new senators are not expected to speak for several weeks. But these are not ordinary times and this is no time for business-as-usual. I could not remain silent in the face of this outrage. Yesterday -- in my first speech on the Senate floor -- I pledged to fight every day to defeat their reckless plan.
>
> **[Please add your name to tell Republicans in Congress that you're standing with me against their efforts to dismantle the ACA.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c77/3780787287/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+to+tell+Republicans&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917")** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c74/3780787287/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917") If Congressional Republicans get their way, the ensuing healthcare crisis will destroy access to affordable care for the 30 million Americans who receive healthcare through the ACA exchanges and expanded Medicaid. It will also have a harmful impact on millions more including the majority of Americans who get their health insurance through their employers, seniors on Medicare, and individuals who have benefited from the ACA patient protections against discrimination due to preexisting conditions -- including the 'preexisting condition' of being female. And the list goes on.
>
> We cannot let this happen, friend. We MUST fight to protect the progress that we've made.
>
> Please add your name and tell Senate Republicans that the American people will not let them get away with dismantling health care and then running off. Let them know they will not be able to hide and that we will hold them accountable. The voices of the American people need to be heard. We must stop them now!
>
> **[http://action.vanhollen.org/Protect-The-ACA](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c75/3780787287/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+httpactionvanhollenorgProtectTheACA&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917")**
>
> Thank you for standing for what's right,
>
> Chris
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c72/3780787287/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b51/70cdc2ba/4739f912/3979c73/3780787287/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em010917&source=em010917") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Barack Obama
subject: re: the cynics who doubted us
body:
I need you to help prove the cynics wrong again Friend --

There are cynics who have doubted us at every step these past eight years -- who said that our desire for change was unrealistic and that our agenda was little more than a pipe dream. But thanks to millions of Democrats like you, we've been able to prove them wrong time and again.

We have some legislative battles to fight in the months ahead and, sooner than you might realize, it'll be time to prepare for some tough elections next year. And the cynics are at it again, saying that our values have been defeated and that Democrats aren't fired up.

We need your help to prove them wrong once more -- and to send an important message about how ready our party is for the weeks, months, and years to come.

Chip in $3 or more, and let's show everyone that we're ready to keep fighting.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c95d/3816423697/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c95a/3816423697/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c95b/3816423697/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c958/3816423697/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c959/3816423697/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c966/3816423697/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd")**

** Thanks,

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c967/3816423697/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c964/3816423697/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c965/3816423697/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1cf/4067b0a/2341cee5c/7e79c962/3816423697/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170109_bo2_nd&source=em_20170109_bo2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
